# RFC-0000: <title>

- **Status:** Draft <!-- Draft | In review | Accepted | Rejected | Superseded by RFC-XXXX -->
- **Author(s):** <name>
- **Created:** YYYY-MM-DD
- **Discussion:** <link to PR/issue thread>

## Summary

One paragraph: what is being proposed, in plain language.

## Motivation

What problem does this solve? Why now? Who is affected? What happens if we do
nothing?

## Goals / Non-goals

- **Goals:** what success looks like.
- **Non-goals:** explicitly out of scope (so the discussion stays bounded).

## Proposal

The proposed change at a level a reviewer can react to. Include user-visible
behaviour and rough shape of the solution.

## Alternatives considered

For each: a short description and why it was not chosen. "Do nothing" is a valid
alternative — include it.

## Risks & open questions

Known unknowns, trade-offs, things you want feedback on.

## Impact

Compatibility, migration, docs, tests, dependencies, security/privacy.

## Decision

Filled in when the RFC is resolved. Link the resulting ADR(s) and/or Tech Spec.
